title: Biology
description: A broad life sciences major covering cells, genetics, physiology, ecology, and the living world.

title: Public Health
description: Focuses on population wellness, disease prevention, health policy, epidemiology, and community health systems.

title: Nutrition Science
description: Studies human metabolism, diet, nutrients, and the role of food in health, wellness, and performance.

title: Health Sciences
description: A general major that prepares students for healthcare, wellness, research, and related professional pathways.

title: Kinesiology
description: Explores human movement, exercise physiology, biomechanics, and the science of physical activity.

title: Pre-Physical Therapy
description: Designed for students planning to enter physical therapy graduate study, with emphasis on anatomy and movement.

title: Athletic Training
description: Covers injury prevention, rehabilitation, emergency care, and support for physically active populations.
